["My outdoor garden room that leads to my chicken runs and coop. Both of these projects are my favorite, but being that they are intertwined and related, I consider them somewhat of the same project. My outdoor garden room is right off the back deck and is enclosed, it has gravel and natural stone and brick for the ground and walkway with seating and a small fire pit. It has a pathway that lead to part of my chicken run. The run is enclosed with hardware cloth and old vintage repurposed beam wood, along with new wood. It's decorative and functional. The run is larg and is attached to the side of the chicken coop. I enjoy watching my chickens, so the garden room is a way to be in nature and comfortable while watching and interacting with my chickens in their run. I call it my \"people run\".", "1", "Stein's", "Bricks"]
